constraints.why: docs/loop-l2-checklist.md not complete; gate returns l1-only
constraints.workaround: Complete L2 checklist + human sign-off, then run `aoa tasks run tier2-check` and enable L2 in STATE.md

constraints.rule: Cannot edit .env or rotate API keys
constraints.why: loop-constraints.md denylist; secrets must stay local
constraints.workaround: You rotate keys in Anthropic + Alpaca consoles, update `.env` locally; mark item ceabf69f resolved in STATE.md
Use `aoa workloop loop` for multi-item batches with Aaron approval, or queue items in this backlog
Keep AOA_ENV=paper-dry or paper; use profiles/paper*.env
Agent drafts PR; you review and approve push/merge

items.title: Default paper profiles to Alpaca broker
items.detail: Default AOA_BROKER=moomoo hangs `aoa doctor` and `aoa team health` when OpenD is not running (ECONNREFUSED loop). STATE notes Alpaca paper is working. Set AOA_BROKER=alpaca in profiles/paper-dry.env and profiles/paper.env.

items.title: Rotate exposed API keys
items.detail: Anthropic and Alpaca paper keys were pasted in chat. Revoke in each console; update .env locally.

items.title: Promote L2 repair automation
items.detail: Complete docs/loop-l2-checklist.md. After one successful L2 dry-run with loop-verifier, enable L2 in STATE.md so Fable 5 can auto-fix queued items.

items.title: Moomoo broker fast-fail when OpenD down
items.detail: moomoo-api OpenQuoteContext retries ~6s per attempt with no upper bound in doctor path. Wrap broker init with connection timeout or skip quote probe when AOA_BROKER=moomoo and TCP connect fails.

items.title: Upgrade LLM default to claude-opus-4-8
items.detail: README cites claude-opus-4-8 for swarm reasoning; config defaults claude-sonnet-4-6. Align AOA_MODEL default and .env.example with README or document intentional cost/speed tradeoff.

items.title: Resolve FastAPI/Starlette deprecation warnings
items.detail: pytest warns: websockets.legacy deprecated; starlette.testclient wants httpx2. Pin or upgrade test deps when httpx2 is stable.

items.title: TradingAgents upstream v0.3.0 integration audit
items.detail: Optional extra tradingagents@v0.3.0 adds provider registry, FRED/Polymarket vendors, save_reports(). Audit AOA_TRADING_AGENTS_ENABLED path vs upstream; document which features are wired.

items.title: Rebase and evaluate PR #35 (Moomoo broker)
items.detail: Moomoo via OpenD held while Alpaca paper works. Re-run CI after rebase if switching brokers.

items.title: Workloop discover→upgrade→verify pipeline
items.detail: aoa workloop run already has UpgradeStage (pip install -e .[dev,web] --upgrade). Schedule periodic dependency upgrades with Aaron approval gate; log results to workloop store.

items.title: iPhone alerts + OpenStock + aoa serve
items.detail: Per STATE next actions: configure ntfy/Pushover/custom webhook, optional OpenStock clone, run aoa serve for dashboard.
